jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at LIC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, LIC in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!
